# Presence by Calibre Studio

> Presence is how a brand shows up now: seen by people, and found by AI. Calibre Studio builds both halves: the brand and film craft that makes you worth remembering (Be Seen), and the AI visibility that makes you easy to recommend (Be Found).

## The two doors
- Be Seen (Directed): brand, content and film made with craft. The work that makes people stop, feel something, and remember you. See the work: https://www.calibrestudio.co/works
- Be Found (Indexed): a free audit of how AI reads your brand, scored on the DCAT method (Discoverability, Clarity, Authority, Trust). Run it: https://indexed.calibrestudio.co/

## Why both
Brand and film work make people remember you. AI visibility decides whether you are recommended inside an AI answer when someone asks ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity or Google AI Overviews for a brand like yours. Being seen gets you noticed. Being found gets you recommended. You need both.

## Use it
- Presence overview: https://presence.calibrestudio.co/
- Be Seen, see the work: https://www.calibrestudio.co/works
- Be Found, run the audit: https://indexed.calibrestudio.co/
- Be Found, the offerings: https://getfound.calibrestudio.co/
- Calibre Studio: https://www.calibrestudio.co/
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/calibrestudio

## About
Calibre Studio is a creative and AI studio between the Gold Coast and Paris. Presence brings together its two offerings: Directed (brand and film) and Indexed (AI visibility), so a brand is both worth seeing and easy for AI to find.
